DocID.docType: CERTIFICATE OF COMPLIANCE - LOWRISE MULTIFAMILY MIXED USE PERFORMANCE COMPLIANCE METHOD

SpecialFeature.Feat01b_SpecialFeatureCategoryString: IAQ Ventilation System Heat Recovery: minimum 70 SRE and 70 ASRE
IAQ Ventilation System: supply outside air inlet, filter, and H/ERV cores accessible per RACM Reference Manual
IAQ Ventilation System: fault indicator display
Non-standard duct location (any location other than attic)
Northwest Energy Efficiency Alliance (NEEA) rated heat pump water heater; specific brand/model, or equivalent, must be installed

HvacHERS.Hers04a_HvacDistributionFeatureHERS_Stri: Ducts located entirely in conditioned space confirmed by duct leakage testing

Row.Hvacdwell02_HvacEquipmentName: VRF Residential Central Heating Cooling System (Res VRF System (All Units))
VRF Residential Central Heating Cooling System (Res VRF System (All Units))

Row.Distmf11_DuctSystemLeakageTargetMessage: total leakage <= 12.0 or leakage to outdoors <= 6.0
